description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture and culinary delights of Hanoi, where ancient traditions meet modern comforts. This 3-day getaway is designed for the solo traveler seeking a blend of relaxation and gourmet experiences. From exploring the bustling streets filled with tantalizing street food to unwinding in luxurious resorts, this itinerary offers a perfect balance of adventure and tranquility.

activities.activity: Check-in at Hotel de l'Opera Hanoi
activities.description: Settle into the luxurious Hotel de l'Opera, a stunning blend of French colonial architecture and modern comfort. Enjoy a refreshing welcome drink as you prepare for your culinary adventure in Hanoi.

activities.activity: Lunch at Cha Ca Thang Long
activities.description: Savor the famous Cha Ca, a traditional Hanoi dish of grilled fish marinated with turmeric and dill, served with vermicelli noodles and fresh herbs. This local favorite is a must-try for any food lover.
Stroll around the picturesque Hoan Kiem Lake, a serene oasis in the heart of the city. Don't miss the iconic Turtle Tower and the beautiful Ngoc Son Temple located on an island in the lake.

Wander through the bustling streets of the Old Quarter, where you can find charming shops, street food stalls, and vibrant local culture. Be sure to try some egg coffee at a local café for a unique treat.

Indulge in a delightful dinner at Home Hanoi, known for its authentic Vietnamese cuisine and elegant ambiance. Enjoy dishes made from fresh, local ingredients in a beautifully restored colonial house.

activities.activity: Evening Walk in the Old Quarter
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening stroll through the Old Quarter, where the streets come alive with lights and sounds. Experience the vibrant nightlife and perhaps stop for a nightcap at a rooftop bar with a view.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Hanoi Social Club
activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at The Hanoi Social Club, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious options like avocado toast and Vietnamese coffee. It's a perfect spot to fuel up before a day of exploration.

Visit the Temple of Literature, Vietnam's first national university, where you can stroll through beautiful gardens and admire ancient architecture. This serene place is a great introduction to Vietnamese culture and history.

activities.activity: Lunch at Cha Ca Thang Long
activities.description: Enjoy a traditional Vietnamese lunch at Cha Ca Thang Long, famous for its grilled fish dish served with herbs and rice noodles. This local favorite offers an authentic taste of Hanoi's culinary scene.

Experience the unique art of water puppetry at the Thang Long Water Puppet Theatre. This traditional Vietnamese performance is both entertaining and culturally enriching, showcasing stories from Vietnamese folklore.

activities.activity: Relax at Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi
activities.description: Unwind at the luxurious Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi, where you can enjoy a refreshing drink by the pool or indulge in a spa treatment. This historic hotel offers a perfect blend of relaxation and elegance.
Savor a delightful dinner at Home Hanoi Restaurant, which offers a modern twist on traditional Vietnamese dishes. The ambiance is warm and inviting, making it a great place to reflect on your day.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake
activities.description: End your day with a leisurely stroll around Hoan Kiem Lake. The peaceful atmosphere and beautiful night lights create a perfect setting for relaxation and reflection after a busy day.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Hanoi Social Club
activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at The Hanoi Social Club, known for its cozy atmosphere and delicious options like avocado toast and Vietnamese coffee. It's a great spot to relax and enjoy the local vibe.

Take a leisurely stroll around West Lake, the largest lake in Hanoi. Enjoy the serene views and perhaps stop by one of the lakeside cafes for a refreshing drink. The peaceful ambiance makes it a perfect spot for reflection.

Wander through the local markets near West Lake, where you can find fresh produce, handmade crafts, and local delicacies. It's a great opportunity to immerse yourself in the local culture and pick up some unique souvenirs.

activities.activity: Lunch at Cha Ca Thang Long
activities.description: Indulge in a traditional Vietnamese dish, Cha Ca, at Cha Ca Thang Long. This restaurant is famous for its grilled fish served with herbs and rice noodles, offering a true taste of Hanoi's culinary heritage.

Treat yourself to a relaxing spa session at one of Hanoi's top spas. Enjoy a massage or a facial to unwind before your departure. It's the perfect way to pamper yourself after a few days of exploration.

activities.activity: Return to Hotel and Prepare for Departure
activities.description: Head back to your hotel to pack and prepare for your journey home. Take a moment to reflect on your wonderful experiences in Hanoi.
